outfit_info.outfit_description: A young boy wears a casual, layered outfit, featuring a brown and black checked puffer jacket over a blue corduroy shirt. This is paired with practical khaki cargo shorts and completed with multi-colored hook-and-loop sneakers, creating a comfortable and adventurous look suitable for diverse outdoor settings.

model_attributes.body: A young boy with a lean build and wavy light brown hair, presenting a calm and direct gaze.
model_attributes.pose: Standing upright with a neutral posture, arms relaxed at his sides, facing directly forward with a serious expression.
model_attributes.background: A surreal, misty landscape featuring a glacial lagoon filled with ice chunks and numerous yellow rubber ducks.
